summary.zh: 通过即时状态、骨架和连续反馈缩短用户感受到的等待。
summary.en: Reduce perceived waiting with immediate state changes, skeletons, and continuous feedback.

definition.zh: 恰当的动画可以让界面在实际速度未变化时显得更快。
definition.en: Motion and progressive feedback reduce uncertainty during waiting, changing how fast the interface feels.

purpose.zh: 通过即时状态、稳定骨架和连续反馈缩短用户感受到的等待。
purpose.en: Reduce perceived waiting through immediate state changes, stable skeletons, and continuous feedback.

frequency.zh: 用于所有可感知等待路径，并根据真实延迟选择反馈层级。
frequency.en: Apply to every perceivable wait path, choosing feedback depth from actual latency.

trigger.zh: 输入确认后立即触发，随后按延迟阈值升级为进度、骨架或可取消状态。
trigger.en: Trigger immediately after input, escalating to progress, skeleton, or cancellable state at latency thresholds.

enterExit.zh: 先确认输入，再维持布局，最终内容就绪时平滑接管；失败状态快速显现。
enterExit.en: Confirm input first, preserve layout during waiting, and hand off smoothly to ready content, surfacing failures quickly.

interruptibility.zh: 用户取消、新请求和失败重试都更新同一状态机，清理旧反馈。
interruptibility.en: Handle cancel, replacement requests, and retries through one state machine that cleans up stale feedback.

gestureRules.zh: 长任务提供取消与返回；按钮保持键盘操作，进度状态可被辅助技术理解。
gestureRules.en: Long tasks provide cancel and back paths, with keyboard-operable controls and accessible progress state.

reducedMotion.zh: 关闭循环扫光和大幅过渡，保留即时状态、静态骨架与进度文本。
reducedMotion.en: Disable looping shimmer and large transitions while preserving immediate state, static skeletons, and progress text.

reviewNotes.zh: 按真实延迟测量体验，避免用动画掩盖性能问题。
reviewNotes.en: Measure against real latency and keep motion from hiding performance problems.

reviewNotes.zh: 区分确定进度、未知进度和瞬时等待。
reviewNotes.en: Distinguish determinate progress, indeterminate progress, and momentary waiting.
